headline: Garmin Expands Aviation And Health Reach With SmartCharts And AI Partnerships
summary: Garmin (NYSE:GRMN) has launched SmartCharts, an interactive aviation charting solution, on Garmin Pilot Web, expanding its digital tools for pilots. SmartCharts is designed to plug into pilot planning workflows and sync across web and mobile, aiming to streamline preflight and in-flight chart use. Separately, Garmin has partnered with Soaak Technologies to use Garmin Health APIs in AI-driven feedback products that respond to real-time biometric data. For investors watching NYSE:GRMN, these...
